name: Party Time Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Cream together the butter and sugar using an electric mixer at medium speed. Add the vanilla and almond extracts, and beat well. Scrape the bowl clean. Gradually add the flour, chocolate chips, and almonds, and blend on low speed until just mixed; do not overmix.
3. Using a rounded tablespoon, shape the mixture into 1 1/2-inch balls and place them on an ungreased cookie sheet about 2 inches apart. Press each ball with the palm of your hand or the bottom of a drinking glass to form cookies that are about 1/2 inch thick.
4. Bake for 15-17 minutes, or until just beginning to brown. Remove from oven and let cool on a flat surface.
Source: "Mrs. Fields Cookie Book", 1992
